example.gloss: Science changes our everyday life.

example.target: Poznata znanstvenica drži predavanje na fakultetu.
example.gloss: A famous scientist is giving a lecture at the university.

example.target: Njihovo istraživanje trajalo je pet godina.
example.gloss: Their research lasted five years.
The researcher is working on a new project.
Scientists are researching the causes of the disease.

example.target: Moramo istražiti taj problem do kraja.
example.gloss: We have to investigate that problem thoroughly.

example.target: To je bilo najveće otkriće dvadesetog stoljeća.
example.gloss: That was the greatest discovery of the twentieth century.
Astronomers are constantly discovering new planets.
Who discovered penicillin?

example.target: Internet je važan izum dvadesetog stoljeća.
example.gloss: The internet is an important invention of the twentieth century.

words.note: nepostojano a: G. pronalaska; synonym of izum

example.gloss: That invention changed history.

example.target: Nikola Tesla bio je veliki izumitelj.
example.gloss: Nikola Tesla was a great inventor.

example.target: Mlada izumiteljica predstavila je svoj novi uređaj.
example.gloss: The young inventor presented her new device.

words.note: impf. izumljivati (rare); not to be confused with izumrijeti (to go extinct)

example.gloss: Who invented the telephone?

example.target: Izumitelj je prijavio patent za svoj uređaj.
example.gloss: The inventor filed a patent for his device.
Who invented the light bulb?

example.target: Kotač je jedan od najstarijih izuma.
example.gloss: The wheel is one of the oldest inventions.
The phone's battery drains quickly.
Einstein was a true genius.

example.target: U školi smo radili pokus iz kemije.
example.gloss: At school we did a chemistry experiment.

example.target: Eksperiment je uspio iz prvog pokušaja.
example.gloss: The experiment succeeded on the first try.
The samples are analysed in the laboratory.
That theory has not been proven yet.
The measurement results were accurate.
The device measures the air temperature.
We measured the length of the room.

example.target: Kupio sam pametni uređaj za dom.
example.gloss: I bought a smart device for the home.

example.target: Ovaj stroj može raditi cijeli dan bez prestanka.
example.gloss: This machine can run all day without stopping.
Modern technology is developing quickly.
Artificial intelligence is already writing texts.
I don't like artificial materials.

words.en: piece of data, piece of information
words.note: pl. podaci; usually used in plural

example.gloss: That data is not accurate.

words.note: pf. razviti; also razvijati se (to develop, intr.)

example.gloss: The company is developing a new application.
Scientists have developed a new vaccine.

words.note: pf. izračunati; računati na + acc. = to count on

example.gloss: A computer calculates faster than a human.

example.target: Možeš li izračunati koliko to košta?
example.gloss: Can you calculate how much that costs?
I can't memorize that formula.

example.target: Nestalo je struje u cijeloj zgradi.
example.gloss: The electricity went out in the whole building.
The sun gives us energy.
Astronauts travel into space.
Mars is the red planet.
The rocket took off towards the Moon.
Satellites orbit the Earth.

example.target: Astronaut je proveo šest mjeseci u svemiru.
example.gloss: The astronaut spent six months in space.

example.target: Kemija mi je bila najdraži predmet u školi.
example.gloss: Chemistry was my favourite subject at school.

example.target: Profesor fizike objasnio nam je zakon gravitacije.
example.gloss: The physics teacher explained the law of gravity to us.

example.target: Na biologiji učimo o ljudskom tijelu.
example.gloss: In biology we learn about the human body.

example.target: Bakterije se vide samo pod mikroskopom.
example.gloss: Bacteria can only be seen under a microscope.

example.target: Cjepivo protiv gripe prima se svake jeseni.
example.gloss: The flu vaccine is given every autumn.

example.target: Liječnik je poslao uzorak krvi u laboratorij.
example.gloss: The doctor sent a blood sample to the laboratory.
I read an interesting scientific article.
We live in a modern world.
Children grow up with digital technologies.

example.target: Roboti u tvornici rade dvadeset četiri sata dnevno.
example.gloss: The robots in the factory work twenty-four hours a day.
I'm interested in contemporary art.

example.target: Mladi umjetnik izlaže u gradskoj galeriji.
example.gloss: The young artist is exhibiting in the city gallery.
That artist paints portraits.

example.target: Ovo djelo nastalo je prije sto godina.
example.gloss: This work was created a hundred years ago.
That opera is a true masterpiece.
The painter is preparing a new exhibition.

example.target: Slikarica prodaje svoje slike na trgu.
example.gloss: The painter sells her paintings on the square.
She studies painting at the academy.
On weekends he paints landscapes.
She painted a portrait of her grandmother.

example.target: Slikar je oprao kistove nakon rada.
example.gloss: The painter washed his brushes after working.
The artist paints on a large canvas.

example.target: Na trgu stoji kip bana Jelačića.
example.gloss: The statue of Ban Jelačić stands on the square.

example.target: Ivan Meštrović najpoznatiji je hrvatski kipar.
example.gloss: Ivan Meštrović is the most famous Croatian sculptor.

example.target: Muzej ima bogatu zbirku starih slika.
example.gloss: The museum has a rich collection of old paintings.
The theatre play starts at eight.

example.target: Glumica je dobila nagradu za najbolju ulogu.
example.gloss: The actress received the award for best role.

example.target: Glumi u kazalištu već deset godina.
example.gloss: He has been acting in the theatre for ten years.

example.target: Dobio je glavnu ulogu u novom filmu.
example.gloss: He got the lead role in a new film.
The director is happy with the actors.
The director is preparing her first play.
The actors came out onto the stage.
The choir has a rehearsal every Wednesday.
The play ended with long applause.

example.target: Tin Ujević poznati je hrvatski pjesnik.
example.gloss: Tin Ujević is a famous Croatian poet.

example.target: Vesna Parun bila je velika pjesnikinja.
example.gloss: Vesna Parun was a great poet.

example.target: Njegovo pjesništvo prevedeno je na mnoge jezike.
example.gloss: His poetry has been translated into many languages.
We learned a few verses by heart.
I'm reading a novel by a famous Croatian writer.
She wrote a collection of short stories.

example.target: Baka nam je pričala stare priče.
example.gloss: Grandma told us old stories.

example.target: Radnja romana događa se u Zagrebu.
example.gloss: The plot of the novel takes place in Zagreb.

example.target: Glavni lik romana je mladi liječnik.
example.gloss: The main character of the novel is a young doctor.

example.target: Miroslav Krleža najveći je hrvatski književnik.
example.gloss: Miroslav Krleža is the greatest Croatian writer.

example.target: Ta književnica piše romane za mlade.
example.gloss: That writer writes novels for young people.
She studies Croatian literature at university.

example.target: Film je osvojio nagradu na festivalu.
example.gloss: The film won an award at the festival.

example.target: Svakog ljeta idemo na filmski festival u Pulu.
example.gloss: Every summer we go to the film festival in Pula.
The orchestra is playing Beethoven tonight.

example.target: Skladatelj je napisao glazbu za film.
example.gloss: The composer wrote the music for the film.
This piece of music lasts ten minutes.
I sing in the church choir.
Do you play an instrument?
My brother plays the guitar.

example.target: Dubrovnik je dio svjetske kulturne baštine.
example.gloss: Dubrovnik is part of world cultural heritage.
We preserve the legacy of our ancestors.
I'm interested in the culture of other peoples.

example.target: U gradu se održavaju mnoga kulturna događanja.
example.gloss: Many cultural events take place in the city.
I admire the old architecture of Split.
The child is drawing a house and a tree.

example.target: Nacrtaj mi plan grada, molim te.
example.gloss: Draw me a map of the city, please.
The painter painted my portrait.

example.target: Publika je nagradila izvedbu velikim pljeskom.
example.gloss: The audience rewarded the performance with loud applause.

example.target: Sinoć smo gledali balet u kazalištu.
example.gloss: Last night we watched a ballet at the theatre.
I have never been to the opera.

example.target: Umjetnik stvara nova djela svake godine.
example.gloss: The artist creates new works every year.
They created something completely new.
Children have a rich imagination.

example.target: Na satu biologije učimo o ekologiji.
example.gloss: In biology class we learn about ecology.

example.target: Zaštita okoliša važna je za budućnost.
example.gloss: Environmental protection is important for the future.
The law protects endangered species.
We must protect the forests from fires.
The Plitvice Lakes are a protected area.

example.target: Ris je ugrožena vrsta u Hrvatskoj.
example.gloss: The lynx is an endangered species in Croatia.
The city is planning sustainable development of tourism.

example.target: Sunce i vjetar obnovljivi su izvori energije.
example.gloss: The sun and wind are renewable sources of energy.

example.target: Kuća se grije na sunčevu energiju.
example.gloss: The house is heated with solar energy.

example.target: Na brdu iznad grada rade vjetroelektrane.
example.gloss: Wind turbines operate on the hill above the town.
The old power plant pollutes the air.
We must use fewer fossil fuels.

example.target: Nova rasvjeta donosi veliku uštedu energije.
example.gloss: The new lighting brings big energy savings.
Electricity consumption rises in winter.
The factories pollute the river.
Chemicals polluted the lake.

example.target: Tvornica je najveći zagađivač u regiji.
example.gloss: The factory is the biggest polluter in the region.

example.target: Onečišćenje mora veliki je problem ljeti.
example.gloss: Sea pollution is a big problem in summer.

example.target: Ispušni plinovi automobila zagađuju zrak u gradu.
example.gloss: Car exhaust fumes pollute the air in the city.
Cars emit carbon dioxide.
The greenhouse effect is warming the planet.

example.target: Globalno zatopljenje topi led na polovima.
example.gloss: Global warming is melting the ice at the poles.

example.target: Ozonski omotač štiti Zemlju od štetnog zračenja.
example.gloss: The ozone layer protects the Earth from harmful radiation.
The sea level is slowly rising.
Many species are threatened with extinction.

words.en: to be dying out, to be going extinct

example.target: Mnoge životinjske vrste izumiru zbog čovjeka.
example.gloss: Many animal species are dying out because of humans.

words.note: impf. izumirati; not to be confused with izumiti (to invent)

example.target: Dinosauri su izumrli prije 66 milijuna godina.
example.gloss: Dinosaurs went extinct 66 million years ago.
Many species are slowly disappearing.

example.target: Pola šume nestalo je u požaru.
example.gloss: Half the forest disappeared in the fire.

example.target: U parku živi dvjesto vrsta ptica.
example.gloss: Two hundred species of birds live in the park.
Rare birds live in the park.
Wild animals live in the forest.
The marsh is a habitat for many birds.

example.target: U vrtu raste dvadesetak različitih biljaka.
example.gloss: About twenty different plants grow in the garden.

example.target: Plodno tlo važno je za poljoprivredu.
example.gloss: Fertile soil is important for agriculture.
National parks preserve natural riches.

example.target: Plitvice su najstariji hrvatski nacionalni park.
example.gloss: Plitvice is the oldest Croatian national park.

words.en: to keep, to guard, to preserve

example.gloss: Let's preserve nature for future generations.
We want to preserve a clean sea.
Volunteers rescue injured birds.
Can we still save the planet?

example.target: U proljeće sadimo cvijeće i povrće.
example.gloss: In spring we plant flowers and vegetables.
The pupils planted a hundred trees.

words.en: to grow, to cultivate, to breed

example.gloss: Grandpa grows tomatoes in the garden.
We grew our own lettuce.
We buy organic vegetables at the market.
We use eco-friendly bags instead of plastic ones.

example.target: Otrovne tvari ne smiju završiti u rijeci.
example.gloss: Toxic substances must not end up in the river.
By recycling paper we preserve forests.
We separate paper from plastic.

example.target: Odvoji stare baterije u posebnu kutiju.
example.gloss: Set old batteries aside in a separate box.
Plastic goes into the yellow container.

example.target: Baci papir u kantu za smeće.
example.gloss: Throw the paper into the rubbish bin.
The city is closing the old waste landfill.

example.target: Zalihe pitke vode sve su manje.
example.gloss: Drinking water supplies are getting smaller and smaller.
The city is reducing its energy consumption.
We must reduce the amount of waste.
A healthy diet starts with breakfast.

example.target: Svježa hrana zdravija je od brze hrane.
example.gloss: Fresh food is healthier than fast food.
We buy groceries at the market.
I eat three meals a day.
We ordered food and drinks.
The waiter brought us the menu.

example.target: Porcije u ovom restoranu su ogromne.
example.gloss: The portions in this restaurant are huge.
Walnuts are very nutritious.
The cake has too many calories.

example.target: Meso, jaja i riba bogati su bjelančevinama.
example.gloss: Meat, eggs and fish are rich in proteins.

example.target: Kruh i tjestenina puni su ugljikohidrata.
example.gloss: Bread and pasta are full of carbohydrates.
I buy milk with less fat.
Oranges are full of vitamin C.
Vegetables contain a lot of fibre.

example.target: Pretilost je sve veći problem kod djece.
example.gloss: Obesity is a growing problem among children.

words.note: biti na dijeti = to be on a diet

example.gloss: I've been on a diet since Monday.
He's losing weight because he exercises every day.
He lost five kilograms.
In winter people easily gain weight.
I gained weight over the holidays.
I avoid sweets and fizzy drinks.
How to avoid stress at work?
Don't overdo it with the salt!
I overdid it with coffee today.
Moderation is important in everything.
After training I have a big appetite.
Fast food is bad for your health.
Frozen vegetables are quick to prepare.
Canned fish lasts a long time.

example.target: Prerađena hrana sadrži puno soli i šećera.
example.gloss: Processed food contains a lot of salt and sugar.

example.target: Ekološki uzgoj povrća sve je popularniji.
example.gloss: Organic vegetable farming is increasingly popular.

example.target: Domaća proizvodnja hrane vrlo je važna.
example.gloss: Domestic food production is very important.
This factory produces juices.

example.target: Lani su proizveli tisuću litara maslinova ulja.
example.gloss: Last year they produced a thousand litres of olive oil.
This soup has a strange taste.
The dinner was very tasty.
This apple is very sweet.
The cheese is too salty.
Black coffee is bitter.

words.note: f. kisela; kiselo mlijeko = soured milk

example.gloss: Lemon is very sour.
I love the smell of fresh bread.
Add the spices at the end of cooking.
After lunch we eat a dessert.

words.note: used biaspectually; cf. probati (already in deck)

example.gloss: Would you like to taste homemade prosciutto?

words.note: nepostojano a: G. vegetarijanca; f. vegetarijanka

example.target: Moj brat je vegetarijanac i ne jede meso.
example.gloss: My brother is a vegetarian and doesn't eat meat.
Regular exercise strengthens the heart.
Vitamins strengthen immunity.
Fibre helps digestion.

words.note: Smijeh je lijek. = Laughter is medicine.

example.target: Kažu da je smijeh najbolji lijek.
example.gloss: They say laughter is the best medicine.

words.note: smisao za humor = sense of humour

example.target: Moj djed ima odličan smisao za humor.
example.gloss: My grandpa has a great sense of humour.
That was just a joke.
He told us a funny joke.
She greeted me with a warm smile.
The baby smiles all day long.
She smiled when she saw me.
Laughter improves the mood.
Stress has a bad effect on health.
